emails.subject: Meter 1517
emails.body: Meter 1517 Daren I know you have been busy, but I left you a voice mail yesterday about meter 1517. There was flow of 14 mmbtus on Mar. 1. We have no deal at the meter until Mar. 14. Could you either set up a new deal to cover this flow or extend the deal from Feb.? February's deal number was 93804. Please let me know today. Allocations close today. Thanks. Aimee

emails.subject: Re: Meter 1517
emails.body: Re: Meter 1517 I have created deal 244531 to cover this flow. Julie This is actually volume related to the term deal 93804. Volume flowed in March due to timing on changing the meter. Can you attach the term contract to this deal? (I copied the term deal to create the March ticket.) D Aimee Lannou 04/14/2000 09:01 AM

emails.subject: Meter 1517
emails.body: Meter 1517 Daren meter 1517 has a nom of 0/day for Jan. It flowed about 5.400 on day 1. This is a valid flow. Could you please extend the deal from Dec. (deal 506192) or create a new one? Thanks. AL

emails.subject: Re: Meter 1517
emails.body: Daren After checking with MIPS, you are correct. Jan. 1 only flowed 19 dth. The 5882 dth was a bad estimate. A better estimate was received on 1/7/00. Sorry about all the confusion. AL Forwarded by Aimee Lannou/HOU/ECT on 01/10/2001 09:14 AM Aimee Lannou 01/10/2001 09:00 AM
